error.signature: CMake Error: The source directory does not exist — spaces in project path
error.regex: CMake Error.*source directory.*does not exist|CMake.*path.*space|make.*No rule.*space

verdict.summary: CMake build fails when project path contains spaces because generated Makefiles do not quote paths properly.

dead_ends.action: Quote the path in CMakeLists.txt only
dead_ends.why_fails: CMake may quote it correctly in CMakeLists but the generated Makefile may not propagate quotes to all shell commands

dead_ends.action: Replace spaces with underscores in cmake -S argument
dead_ends.why_fails: This changes the actual path; cmake cannot find the source directory at the modified path

workarounds.action: Move or symlink the project to a path without spaces
Use Ninja generator instead of Make — Ninja handles spaces in paths correctly
workarounds.how: cmake -S . -B build -G Ninja  # Ninja properly escapes spaces in generated build files
